## Summary

MS Business Analytics candidate (CEU Vienna, June 2026) with three years
of product-analytics experience at a consumer fintech. Built and shipped
a revenue-attribution model in dbt, owned a 60-experiment A/B testing
pipeline, and now applying experimentation rigor to retention segmentation
at scale. Comfortable translating model outputs into roadmap decisions
for product and exec audiences.

holdout against the live product.
